disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: WHO declares hantavirus outbreak linked to cruise ship over - The Guardian
updates.body_en: WHO declares hantavirus outbreak linked to cruise ship over The Guardian
updates.summary_zh: WHO 宣布与邮轮相关的汉坦病毒疫情结束。

updates.title_en: WHO says cruise ship-linked hantavirus outbreak over - CTV News
updates.body_en: WHO says cruise ship-linked hantavirus outbreak over CTV News
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称邮轮关联的汉坦病毒疫情已结束。

updates.title_en: Health Ministry issues hantavirus alert after Nepal’s first reported death - myRepublica
updates.body_en: Health Ministry issues hantavirus alert after Nepal’s first reported death myRepublica
updates.summary_zh: 尼泊尔首例汉坦病毒死亡后，卫生部发布警报。

updates.title_en: Self-isolation ends for travellers exposed to hantavirus-stricken cruise ship - Times Colonist
updates.body_en: Self-isolation ends for travellers exposed to hantavirus-stricken cruise ship Times Colonist
updates.summary_zh: 接触汉坦病毒邮轮的旅客结束自我隔离。

updates.title_en: Self-isolation over for travellers exposed to hantavirus - Yahoo News Canada
updates.body_en: Self-isolation over for travellers exposed to hantavirus Yahoo News Canada
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大接触汉坦病毒的旅客结束自我隔离。

updates.title_en: Canadians exposed to hantavirus on cruise ship complete isolation period - CBC
updates.body_en: Canadians exposed to hantavirus on cruise ship complete isolation period CBC
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大邮轮接触汉坦病毒者完成隔离。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus self-isolation complete for 34 Canadians, Health Canada says - National - Global News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus self-isolation complete for 34 Canadians, Health Canada says - National Global News
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大34人汉坦病毒自我隔离结束。

updates.title_en: Exclusive | CDC Ends Hantavirus Response as U.S. Outbreak Risk Diminishes - WSJ
updates.body_en: Exclusive | CDC Ends Hantavirus Response as U.S. Outbreak Risk Diminishes WSJ
updates.summary_zh: 美国CDC结束汉坦病毒应急响应。

updates.title_en: HHS Successfully Concludes Hantavirus Response Effort; Monitoring Ends with No Positive U.S. Case - HHS.gov
updates.body_en: HHS Successfully Concludes Hantavirus Response Effort; Monitoring Ends with No Positive U.S. Case HHS.gov
updates.summary_zh: 美国HHS结束汉坦病毒响应，无阳性病例。

updates.title_en: CDC Officially Ends Hantavirus Response as Outbreak Risk Recedes - AJMC
updates.body_en: CDC Officially Ends Hantavirus Response as Outbreak Risk Recedes AJMC
updates.summary_zh: 美国CDC正式结束汉坦病毒响应。

updates.title_en: International public health response helped contain Andes hantavirus outbreak on Dutch cruise ship - CIDRAP
updates.body_en: International public health response helped contain Andes hantavirus outbreak on Dutch cruise ship CIDRAP
updates.summary_zh: 国际响应控制荷兰邮轮汉坦病毒疫情。

updates.title_en: CDC ends US Hantavirus response - The Hill
updates.body_en: CDC ends US Hantavirus response The Hill
updates.summary_zh: 美国CDC结束汉坦病毒响应。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus quarantine ends for Americans held for six weeks in Nebraska - The Guardian
updates.body_en: Hantavirus quarantine ends for Americans held for six weeks in Nebraska The Guardian
updates.summary_zh: 美国内布拉斯加州汉坦病毒隔离结束，美国人被隔离六周。

updates.title_en: Andes Virus Outbreak on a Cruise Ship: Current Situation | Hantavirus - Centers for Disease Control and Prevention | CDC (.gov)
updates.body_en: Andes Virus Outbreak on a Cruise Ship: Current Situation | Hantavirus Centers for Disease Control and Prevention | CDC (.gov)
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 发布邮轮安第斯病毒疫情现状。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Quarantine Ends for 18 Americans Exposed on a Cruise Ship - The New York Times
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Quarantine Ends for 18 Americans Exposed on a Cruise Ship The New York Times
updates.summary_zh: 18名美国邮轮接触者汉坦病毒隔离结束。

updates.title_en: ‘It’s not science, it’s coercion’: health experts decry RFK Jr order on hantavirus quarantine - The Guardian
updates.body_en: ‘It’s not science, it’s coercion’: health experts decry RFK Jr order on hantavirus quarantine The Guardian
updates.summary_zh: 卫生专家批评 RFK Jr 关于汉坦病毒隔离的命令。

updates.title_en: CDC NNDSS — Hantavirus infection (US, 2026 week 25): 0 new, 1 YTD
updates.body_en: Weekly aggregate from CDC NNDSS table for "Hantavirus infection, non-hantavirus pulmonary syndrome". Current week: 0. YTD 2026: 1.
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 周报：2026年第25周汉坦病毒新增0例，全年1例。
